parameters.query:
UPDATE properties
SET {{ $json.body.field }} = '{{ $json.body.value }}',
  updated_at = '{{ $now }}'
WHERE ID = '{{ $json.body.property_id }}';

SELECT
p.id,
p.cpf,
p.address,
p.number,
p.postal_code,
p.complement,
p.city,
p.state,
p.property_value,
p.indicacao,
p.has_registry,
p.has_contract,
p.part_of_larger_area,
p.owner_relative,
p.larger_area_registry,
p.city_rural,
p.created_at,
COALESCE(
json_agg(
json_build_object(
'id', cf.id,
'file_name', cf.file_name,
'description', cf.description,
'mime_type', cf.mime_type,
'file_size', cf.file_size,
'drive_web_view_link', cf.drive_web_view_link,
'created_at', cf.created_at
)
) FILTER (WHERE cf.id IS NOT NULL),
'[]'
) AS client_files
FROM properties p
LEFT JOIN client_files cf
ON cf.property_id = p.id
WHERE p.cpf = '{{ $json.cpf }}'
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC;

SELECT
    ppu.id,
    ppu.title,
    ppu.description,
    ppu.created_at,

    COALESCE(
        json_agg(
            json_build_object(
                'id', f.id,
                'file_name', f.file_name,
                'description', f.description,
                'url', f.drive_web_view_link
            )
        ) FILTER (WHERE f.id IS NOT NULL),
        '[]'
    ) AS files

FROM property_process_updates ppu

LEFT JOIN property_process_update_files f
    ON f.process_update_id = ppu.id
    AND f.is_client_visible = TRUE

WHERE ppu.property_id = '{{ $json.body.property_id }}'
AND ppu.is_client_visible = TRUE

GROUP BY ppu.id
ORDER BY ppu.created_at DESC;

SELECT
    ppu.id,
    ppu.title,
    ppu.description,
    ppu.created_at,

    COALESCE(
        json_agg(
            json_build_object(
                'id', f.id,
                'file_name', f.file_name,
                'description', f.description,
                'url', f.drive_web_view_link
            )
        ) FILTER (WHERE f.id IS NOT NULL),
        '[]'
    ) AS files

FROM property_process_updates ppu

LEFT JOIN property_process_update_files f
    ON f.process_update_id = ppu.id
    AND f.is_client_visible = TRUE

WHERE ppu.property_id = 'f3d9541d-6200-4408-aa16-2cf7860b2319'
AND ppu.is_client_visible = TRUE

GROUP BY ppu.id
ORDER BY ppu.created_at DESC;

SELECT
p.id,
p.cpf,
u.id AS user_id,
p.address,
p.number,
p.city,
p.state,
p.property_value,
p.created_at,
COALESCE(
json_agg(
json_build_object(
'id', cf.id,
'file_name', cf.file_name,
'description', cf.description,
'mime_type', cf.mime_type,
'file_size', cf.file_size,
'drive_web_view_link', cf.drive_web_view_link,
'created_at', cf.created_at
)
) FILTER (WHERE cf.id IS NOT NULL),
'[]'
) AS client_files
FROM properties p
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.cpf = p.cpf
LEFT JOIN client_files cf ON cf.property_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, u.id
ORDER BY p.created_at;

SELECT
    p.id AS property_id,
    p.address,
    p.city,
    p.state,

    COALESCE(
        json_agg(
            json_build_object(
                'update_id', u.id,
                'title', u.title,
                'description', u.description,
                'created_at', u.created_at,

                'files',
                COALESCE(
                    (
                        SELECT json_agg(
                            json_build_object(
                                'file_id', f.id,
                                'file_name', f.file_name,
                                'description', f.description,
                                'url', f.drive_web_view_link
                            )
                        )
                        FROM property_process_update_files f
                        WHERE f.process_update_id = u.id
                        AND f.is_client_visible = TRUE
                    ),
                    '[]'
                )
            )
        ) FILTER (WHERE u.id IS NOT NULL),
        '[]'
    ) AS timeline

FROM users usr

JOIN properties p
    ON p.cpf = usr.cpf

LEFT JOIN property_process_updates u
    ON u.property_id = p.id
    AND u.is_client_visible = TRUE

WHERE usr.id = '{{ $json.body.user_id }}'

GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY MAX(u.created_at) DESC;

SELECT
u.*,
t.token,
t.expires_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
SELECT token, expires_at
FROM auth_tokens
WHERE user_id = u.id
AND revoked_at IS NULL
AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now())
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1
) t ON true
WHERE u.cpf = '{{ $json.body.cpf }}'
AND u.password_hash = '{{ $json.body.password }}'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
u.*,
t.token,
t.expires_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
SELECT token, expires_at
FROM auth_tokens
WHERE user_id = u.id
AND revoked_at IS NULL
AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now())
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1
) t ON true
WHERE u.ID = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  u.*,
  t.token,
  t.expires_at
FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
LEFT JOIN users u
  ON u.email = '{{ $json.email }}'
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT token, expires_at
  FROM auth_tokens
  WHERE user_id = u.id
    AND revoked_at IS NULL
    AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now())
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) t ON true;

SELECT
u.*,
t.token,
t.expires_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
SELECT token, expires_at
FROM auth_tokens
WHERE user_id = u.id
AND revoked_at IS NULL
AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > now())
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1
) t ON true
WHERE u.ID = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO tasks (
    id,
    project_id,
    assigned_to,
    title,
    description,
    status,
    priority,
    start_date,
    due_date,
    completed_at,
    created_at,
    updated_at
) VALUES (
    gen_random_uuid(),

    '{{ $json.body.project_id }}'::uuid,

    CASE 
      WHEN '{{ $json.body.assigned_to }}' IN ('', 'undefined', 'null') 
      THEN NULL 
      ELSE '{{ $json.body.assigned_to }}'::uuid 
    END,

    '{{ $json.body.title }}',

    NULLIF('{{ $json.body.description }}',''),

    COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.body.status }}',''), 'todo'),

    COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.body.priority }}',''), 'medium'),

    NULLIF('{{ $json.body.start_date }}','')::date,

    NULLIF('{{ $json.body.due_date }}','')::date,

    CASE 
      WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.body.status }}',''), 'todo') = 'done'
      THEN NOW()
      ELSE NULL
    END,

    NOW(),
    NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

SELECT
  t.id,
  t.project_id,
  t.title,
  t.description,
  t.status,
  t.priority,
  t.start_date,
  t.due_date,
  t.completed_at
FROM tasks t
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = t.project_id
WHERE p.user_id = '{{ $json.body.user_id }}'
ORDER BY t.due_date NULLS LAST, t.created_at DESC;

SELECT
  p.id,
  p.title,
  p.description,
  p.status,
  p.start_date,
  p.due_date,
  c.name AS customer_name
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.id = p.customer_id
WHERE p.user_id = '{{ $json.body.user_id }}'
ORDER BY p.due_date NULLS LAST, p.created_at DESC;

INSERT INTO projects (
    customer_id,
    user_id,
    title,
    description,
    status,
    start_date,
    due_date
) VALUES (
    NULL,
    '{{ $json.body.user_id }}',
    '{{ $json.body.title }}',
    NULLIF('{{ $json.body.description }}',''),
    'active',
    NOW(),
    NULLIF('{{ $json.body.due_date }}','')::date
)
RETURNING *;

UPDATE tasks
SET
    project_id = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.body.project_id ?? "" }}','')::uuid, project_id),

    assigned_to = CASE
        WHEN '{{ $json.body.assigned_to ?? "" }}' IN ('', 'undefined', 'null')
        THEN assigned_to
        ELSE '{{ $json.body.user_id }}'::uuid
    END,

    title = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.body.title ?? "" }}',''), title),

    description = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.body.description ?? "" }}',''), description),

    status = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.body.status ?? "" }}',''), status),

    priority = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.body.priority ?? "" }}',''), priority),

    start_date = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.body.start_date ?? "" }}','')::date, start_date),

    due_date = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.body.due_date ?? "" }}','')::date, due_date),

    completed_at = CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.body.status ?? "" }}',''), status) = 'done'
        THEN NOW()
        ELSE completed_at
    END,

    updated_at = NOW()

WHERE id = '{{ $json.body.task_id }}'::uuid

RETURNING *;

SELECT table_schema,
       table_name
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
  AND table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')
ORDER BY table_schema, table_name;

SELECT
  c.column_name,
  c.data_type,
  c.udt_name,
  c.is_nullable,
  c.column_default,
  c.is_identity,
  c.identity_generation,
  c.is_generated,
  ccu.table_name AS referenced_table_name,
  ccu.column_name AS referenced_column_name
FROM information_schema.columns c
LEFT JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu
  ON c.table_schema = kcu.table_schema
 AND c.table_name = kcu.table_name
 AND c.column_name = kcu.column_name
LEFT JOIN information_schema.table_constraints tc
  ON kcu.constraint_schema = tc.constraint_schema
 AND kcu.constraint_name = tc.constraint_name
 AND tc.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY'
LEFT JOIN information_schema.constraint_column_usage ccu
  ON tc.constraint_schema = ccu.constraint_schema
 AND tc.constraint_name = ccu.constraint_name
WHERE c.table_schema = 'public'
  AND c.table_name = '{{ $json.body.table_name }}'
ORDER BY c.ordinal_position;

SELECT
column_name,
data_type,
udt_name,
is_nullable,
column_default
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema = 'public'
AND table_name = 'agents'
ORDER BY ordinal_position;

SELECT table_schema,
       table_name
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
  AND table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')
ORDER BY table_schema, table_name;

SELECT
  c.column_name,
  c.data_type,
  c.udt_name,
  c.is_nullable,
  c.column_default,
  c.is_identity,
  c.identity_generation,
  c.is_generated,
  ccu.table_name AS referenced_table_name,
  ccu.column_name AS referenced_column_name
FROM information_schema.columns c
LEFT JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu
  ON c.table_schema = kcu.table_schema
 AND c.table_name = kcu.table_name
 AND c.column_name = kcu.column_name
LEFT JOIN information_schema.table_constraints tc
  ON kcu.constraint_schema = tc.constraint_schema
 AND kcu.constraint_name = tc.constraint_name
 AND tc.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY'
LEFT JOIN information_schema.constraint_column_usage ccu
  ON tc.constraint_schema = ccu.constraint_schema
 AND tc.constraint_name = ccu.constraint_name
WHERE c.table_schema = 'public'
  AND c.table_name = '{{ $json.body.table_name }}'
ORDER BY c.ordinal_position;

SELECT
column_name,
data_type,
udt_name,
is_nullable,
column_default
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema = 'public'
AND table_name = 'agents'
ORDER BY ordinal_position;
